name: useRandomColor
description: A hook that generates consistent random colors from a predefined palette based on string input, useful for avatars and tags.
usage_guidelines: Use for generating consistent colors for user avatars without images.
Same input string always returns same color (deterministic).
Returns both background and text color classes.

return_value.description: Function that generates color object based on input string.

Do: Use consistent input for same entity
Apply both background and text classes
Dont: Don't use for critical color coding
Don't expect specific colors for inputs
